page: Amazon Web Services m7i.24xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor and custom Intel Xeon 8488C processors. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it features 96 virtual CPUs across 48 physical cores with hyperthreading enabled, running at a clock speed of 3.2 GHz. The processor includes a 105 MB L3 cache and supports advanced instruction sets, including Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions and Advanced Vector Extensions for accelerated matrix and vector operations.

The instance is equipped with 384 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 5 GHz, providing a balanced 4 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated GPUs, relying instead on network-attached storage. Network connectivity is delivered via a baseline bandwidth of 38 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core performance, with the Passmark CPU score and encryption tests ranking in the top 10% tier. Small-block cached memory read bandwidth also reaches the top 10% tier, while large-block read and write operations maintain strong top-25% performance. The hardware profile is well-suited for workloads such as static web serving, database operations, Redis caching, and CPU-based LLM inference, where it demonstrates strong prompt processing speeds on medium and large models.
description: Amazon Web Services m7i.24xlarge is a general-purpose server instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor and 3.2 GHz Intel Xeon 8488C processors. It features 96 vCPUs, 48 physical cores, and 384 GB of DDR5 memory operating at 5 GHz, providing a balanced 4 GB of RAM per vCPU. The instance does not include local storage or GPUs, but offers a baseline network bandwidth of 38 Gbps. Performance benchmarks show top-tier results in CPU encryption, Passmark CPU scores, and small-block cached memory read bandwidth. It is designed for enterprise workloads, including database operations, static web serving, Redis caching, and CPU-based machine learning inference.
og_description: Amazon Web Services m7i.24xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 96 vCPUs, 384 GB DDR5 RAM, and 3.2 GHz Intel Xeon processors, delivering top-tier CPU and memory bandwidth performance.

tagline: A high-capacity general-purpose instance featuring dedicated Intel Xeon processors, DDR5 memory, and advanced matrix extension support for enterprise workloads.
bullet_points: 96 vCPUs and 384 GB of DDR5 memory running at 5 GHz
Intel Xeon 8488C processor with AMX and AVX-512 instruction sets
Top-tier performance in CPU encryption and small-block memory bandwidth
38 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with Nitro hypervisor integration
Optimized for database operations, Redis caching, and CPU-based LLM inference
